claims.text: Gemini 3.5 Flash includes native computer use as a built-in tool, not a separate model endpoint
Standard Gemini 3.5 Flash pricing: $1.50/1M input tokens, $9.00/1M output tokens (including thinking tokens)
Computer use on Gemini 3.5 Flash is charged as regular tokens at standard model pricing with no additional premium
Google DeepMind published the AI Control Roadmap on June 18, 2026, treating AI agents as insider threats
Gemini 3.5 Flash uses normalized 1000x1000 coordinate space for all computer use actions
Computer use supports three environment types: browser, mobile (phones), and desktop
Gemini 3.5 Flash has a 1M token context window
Seven built-in safety policy categories defined
Gemini 3.5 Flash scored 78.4% on OSWorld-Verified benchmark
Anthropic's computer use is implemented as tool calls within the Messages API
Anthropic warns computer use latency may be too slow for human-in-the-loop interaction
